title: XP: Attribute Core
description: It adds a wide variety of RPG-style attributes
body:
**AttributeCore** is a library mod focused on RPG-style attributes and combat effects for Minecraft. It does not add standalone gameplay content, items, or progression on its own. Instead, it provides a shared foundation that other mods can use to build RPG systems, combat mechanics, gear scaling, pets, aggro, healing, and advanced attribute-driven features. *** ## RPG Attributes AttributeCore provides a large set of custom RPG attributes, grouped into offensive, defensive and utility categories: * **Melee Dmg** * **Max Health** * **Magic Find** * **Thorns** * **Armor Score** * **Pierce** * **Aggro Force** * **Life Steal** * **Healing Power** * **AoE Healing** * **Crit Chance** * **Crit Dmg** * **Dodge Chance** * **Projectile Dmg** * **Draw Speed** * **Extra Jumps** * **Stealth** * **Pet Dmg** * **Steal Chance** * **Spread Chance** * **Buffed Dmg** * **Afflicted Dmg** * **Reflect Damage** *** ## RPG Effects & Auras AttributeCore provides many combat-oriented potion effects and auras, for use by other mods and systems: * **Pet Mastery** — 10% Attack Damage per nearby tamed pet (max +50%). * **Ignition** — Build a charge on hit; consume it to boost damage, stronger vs burning targets. * **Armor Break I / II / III** — Reduce armor and armor toughness by 30% / 50% / 70%. * **True Invisibility** — Complete invisibility; enemies lose aggro on you. * **Blood Rage** — Gain stacks on hit; stacks increase per level; +3% Attack Speed per stack; reset after 5s out of combat. * **Healing Aura** — While blocking with a shield, periodically heal nearby allies. * **Relentless** — +75% Attack Damage. * **Bulwark** — +50% Armor and +75% Armor Toughness. * **Shadow Ambush** — +200% damage, but halves armor and armor toughness. * **Taunt Aura** — Taunts enemies within 10 blocks to focus you. ### Other advanced effects * **Blessing of the Goddess** — +5% healing received per stack (max +100%). * **Arrow Rain** — Summon a rain of arrows for 3s. * **Arrow Fan** — Fire a wide fan of arrows. * **Guardian’s Might** — +20% Attack Damage per level while holding a shield in off-hand (max +200%). * **Frost Walker** — Freeze water into solid ice beneath your feet. * **Magma Walker** — Create temporary obsidian platforms over lava. * **Combo Strike** — Every 3rd strike deals +30% damage per effect level (max +150%). * **Thorns Power** — +0.5% damage per Thorns point per effect level. * **Rampage** — +1.5% damage per level per Attack Damage point. * **Guardian Angel** — +10% damage per level while ready; prevents death every 40s and triggers Phoenix Wings. * **Phoenix Wings** — Grants increased damage, armor, speed, extra jumps and slow fall based on level. * **Piercing Gaze** — Marks up to 3 nearby enemies with Glowing; you deal +50% damage per level to marked targets. * **Shadow Mark** — Marks the nearest enemy every 5s; that target takes +50% damage from you. * **Echo Impact** — 20% chance for attacks to echo, dealing +50% extra damage and releasing a shockwave. * **Time Rupture** — Stores 14% of your damage per level for 5 seconds, then adds it to your next attack. * **Mirror Shadow** — 10% chance on hit to summon an allied shadow copy (max 2 active). * **Blade Slash** — Sword attacks launch an energy slash; Level I: 100% weapon damage; each level adds +37%. * **Blade Master** — Work in progress. *** ## Library / API Focus AttributeCore is intended to be used as a **library/core dependency** by: * RPG and ARPG-style mods * Custom gear and stat frameworks * Class / build systems * Boss and dungeon content * Modpacks with heavy combat scaling and progression On its own, AttributeCore does not try to be a full content mod. It provides the **attributes, effects and hooks** that other mods and datapacks can build upon. ***

🌐 Join Our Discord Community

Do you have new ideas, improvements for my mods, or have you found a bug? This is the perfect place to share them!

In our Discord community you can:

💡 Submit proposals and suggestions for improving the mods.

🛠️ Report problems and bugs so we can fix them together.

🎮 Show your creativity: you're free to use my mods in your own modpacks.

📢 Share your modpack on the server and show the community your unique style.

This space is designed for us to grow together, with respect and enthusiasm for creating mods and modpacks. Your contribution is always welcome!
